scripts.deploy:standalone:dev: pnpm --filter dongle-client deploy:standalone:dev && pnpm --filter dongle-admin deploy:standalone:dev
scripts.deploy:standalone:prod: pnpm --filter dongle-client deploy:standalone:prod && pnpm --filter dongle-admin deploy:standalone:prod
scripts.scp: pnpm run scp:client && pnpm run scp:admin
scripts.deploy:scp:dev: pnpm run deploy:standalone:dev && pnpm run scp:client && pnpm run scp:admin
scripts.deploy:scp:prod: pnpm run deploy:standalone:prod && pnpm run scp:client && pnpm run scp:admin
